utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Bijan for ... Hey , Annabelle , Uh , listen , I was wondering if maybe after work you and I could go maybe grab a cup of coffee .

utterances.speaker: Annabelle
utterances.text: Oh , actually I sorta have plans .

utterances.speaker: Annabelle
utterances.text: You bet . Maybe some other time ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey , it is not the first time I lost a girl to a cowboy spraying cologne . Bijan for men ? Bijan for men ? !

emotion_cause.span: 6_it is not the first time I lost a girl to a cowboy spraying cologne .
